articles.title: Detroit carmakers mostly miss out on demand boom for hybrids
articles.description: Fuel-sipping hybrids have become some of the hottest vehicles on the lot this year as gas prices hover near $4 a gallon. The problem for Detroit’s automakers is that they don’t have many to offer.
